productDisplayName: Flying Machine Women Solid Grey Tops
description: Composition Grey round neck top made of blended fabric, has three quarter sleeves with elasticated cuffs, half buttoned placket with ruffles and an elasticated hem Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Understated grey top from flying machine for women. This top is a classy spin off from the silk staple in your wardrobe with its carefully designed loose fit around the hips. Wear this with a pencil skirt or skinny jeans and stilettos. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
